user_steps.text: Can you quickly check whether there are unresolved review comments? If all clear, merge the latest PR and ship a patch release.
Wait, first send me a webcam photo, then continue with the release work.
Also generate a short diagnostics report as a PDF and attach it here.

wait_for_text.pattern: Diagnostics PDF is ready and attached\.

user_steps.text: This UX for AI agents is really good.

events.text: Checking unresolved comments, required reviews, and status checks before merging.

events.title: Run gh pr view 92 --json reviewDecision,reviews,statusCheckRollup
events.text: No blocking review comments found. Required checks look healthy.

events.title: Run gh pr merge 92 --merge --delete-branch, Run git checkout main, Run git pull --ff-only
Edit pyproject.toml
events.text: Bumped patch version and aligned CLI/docs notes for the release.

events.title: Run uv run pytest tests/test_acp_service.py
events.text: Test suite for ACP service passed.

events.title: Run gh release create v0.1.2 --target main --generate-notes
events.text: Draft release created with auto-generated notes.

agent_routes.cancel_reply_text: Release flow interrupted to process your queued request. I can resume it after the quick task.
agent_routes.final_text: Looks good: no unresolved blockers. I merged the PR, synced `main`, ran the ACP service tests, and prepared the patch release notes.

events.text: I can do that now. I will capture one frame from `/dev/video0` and send it right away.

events.title: Run telegram-channel/telegram_send_attachment
events.text: Uploaded `/tmp/webcam-small.jpg` as a photo via the Telegram MCP channel.

agent_routes.final_text: Done. You are cute ❤️. I will continue working on the release task now.

events.text: Generating a compact diagnostics report in PDF format and attaching it here.

events.title: Run python tools/collect_release_diagnostics.py --format pdf --output /tmp/release-diagnostics.pdf
events.text: CI checks: green. Docs preview: green. Pending: final reviewer ack.

agent_routes.final_text: Diagnostics PDF is ready and attached.

match_any: ux for ai agents is really good

events.text: Yes! We put a lot of love into it ❤️

agent_routes.final_text:
🚀 **telegram-acp-bot** is an **open-source** Python bot.

🤖 It uses the **Agent Client Protocol (ACP)** to connect with agents like **Codex**, **Claude**, **Gemini**, and many others.

🛠️ And you can use it with **your own agent** too!

📚 Check the docs to get started.
